_readme: Phase 1d performance baseline — captured after Phase 1a audit logging deployed.
Regression rule (Phase 2+): if p95AgentTurnMs increases > 20% vs this baseline,
OR avgPromptTokens increases > 200 tokens per turn, a mitigation plan is required
before any Phase 2+ feature is merged.
Re-run docs/baseline/kql-queries.md after each release tag to track drift.

tokenUsagePerTurn._note: Per LLM call; multi-step turns (e.g. create+show ticket) produce multiple samples

perToolLatencyMs._note: DurationMs = wall-clock time inside RetryingMcpTool (MCP HTTP round-trip). Populated from Phase 1 test session.
